package rulecoverage

func PositiveSameDependencyWiredInMultipleBootstrapLocations() string {
    ruleID := "same_dependency_wired_in_multiple_bootstrap_locations"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Duplicated construction of the same service or client in several startup files."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
